summary: Verified fixes for iteration 53 bugs. All 4 test cases PASSED: (1) Brand-logged-in user on /rfq Step 4 now sees blue 'Submitting as...' card with profile data from /api/brand/me, (2) BrandFabricDetail RFQModal shows fabric specs preview and 'Open full RFQ form' link, (3) Public PDP RFQModal shows same fabric specs and link, (4) Clicking 'Open full RFQ form' navigates to /rfq?fabric_id=<id> with specs pre-filled (category, composition, GSM, width, finish).
seed_data_creation: Used existing fabric IDs: 8e6c6e09-f711-455b-9900-1044574d7c25 (Denim), 005c9bda-1a80-4cba-ab3a-9e6bcd1b959a (Cotton Recycled Ripstop)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 53 bugs have been fixed and verified: (1) RFQPage.js now checks lf_brand_token and fetches /api/brand/me for Step 4 logged-in card - VERIFIED WORKING, (2) BrandFabricDetail.js now passes fabric prop to RFQModal - VERIFIED WORKING. PDP prefill via /rfq?fabric_id=<id> works correctly - category, composition, GSM, width, finish are all pre-filled from the fabric data.

brand_loggedin_card_step4.details: Brand users now see blue 'Submitting as...' card on Step 4 with Name, Email, Phone, GST populated from /api/brand/me

brand_pdp_rfqmodal_fabric_specs.details: BrandFabricDetail RFQModal shows fabric specs preview (Composition, Weight, Width, Type) and 'Open full RFQ form' link

public_pdp_rfqmodal_fabric_specs.details: Public PDP RFQModal shows fabric specs preview and 'Open full RFQ form' link

rfq_prefill_from_fabric_id.details: Clicking 'Open full RFQ form' navigates to /rfq?fabric_id=<id> and pre-fills: category (Cotton), fabric_type (Woven), composition (70% Cotton + 30% Recycled Cotton), GSM (142), finish (Silicon)

bugs_fixed_from_iteration_53.bug: Brand users see contact form instead of logged-in card on Step 4
bugs_fixed_from_iteration_53.fix: RFQPage.js useEffect now checks lf_brand_token and fetches /api/brand/me

bugs_fixed_from_iteration_53.bug: RFQModal on BrandFabricDetail doesn't show fabric specs or 'Open full RFQ form' link
bugs_fixed_from_iteration_53.fix: BrandFabricDetail.js now passes fabric={fabric} prop to RFQModal
